reviews.author: Guimo-D Brando
reviews.text: The drive around the lake can be done in various ways, from the road going west, it was not that busy around midday and the drive is super pleasant under the sun and blue sky. Plenty of spot to take a look at nature and the lake's water, enough places to sit down and have a picnic or something that is appropriate for such environment.

reviews.author: Ray Mak
reviews.text: To me, Tuyền Lâm Lake is truly one of the most beautiful lakes in the world. Located about a 30-minute drive from Dalat town, it’s the perfect balance, not too far, not too near, just enough to feel like a peaceful escape. The air here is crisp and clean, and the surrounding area is filled with little attractions worth exploring. The highlight of our trip was definitely kayaking. We booked through Facebook; you’ll notice many pages eventually lead to the same friendly guides who manage the kayaking activities here. We were lucky to visit during a quiet period, no crowds, no rush. It felt like we had the entire lake to ourselves. Just me, my girlfriend, and our kayak coach who not only guided us but also took beautiful photos and even AirDropped them to us afterward. Service was wonderful, and the price was surprisingly affordable. Dalat’s cool climate made everything even better — paddling through calm waters with gentle wind felt relaxing, peaceful, almost meditative. Our coach even cooked two packs of noodles for us by the lake. Simple food, but eaten with that breathtaking view… unforgettable. If you ever visit Dalat, just search “Tuyền Lâm Lake kayak”. Getting here is easy, Grab works perfectly. Highly recommended for couples, nature lovers, or anyone who wants to slow down and breathe.

reviews.author: Phạm Minh Trí
reviews.text: The lake and the nearby forested areas were extremely beautiful. The atmosphere was peaceful and was almost theurapatic. Nice area for picnic.

reviews.author: Elaine
reviews.text: best place to catch the sunset! the view is probably one of the most breathtaking i've seen. felt surreal to the point i almost cried LIKEEEE it was that beautiful 🥹 just felt so grateful to be alive in that moment. 10/10 experience for sure 🫡

reviews.author: Pratik Teli
reviews.text: Perfect spot to enjoy sunset views near Da Lat

reviews.author: Han Nguyen
reviews.text: Absolutely stunning! This is the largest freshwater lake in Da Lat and located in a picturesque area.

reviews.author: Tan Trinh Nguyen
reviews.text: You can go there and also visit the Truc Lam pagoda.

reviews.author: Chee Chin Cheng
reviews.text: Not worth visiting. It’s just another lake with very little to offer, and not possible to stroll around by foot, unless you rent a bike or a car. It’s also quite far from the city center. You’re better off spending your time at Xuan Huong Lake in the city center, which is much more enjoyable.

reviews.author: Long B.
reviews.text: Tuyen Lam Lake in Da Lat is a breathtaking natural gem, offering visitors a peaceful retreat amidst the stunning highland scenery. Surrounded by lush pine forests and rolling hills, the lake’s crystal-clear waters reflect the sky, creating a mesmerizing, picture-perfect landscape. Whether covered in early morning mist or glowing under the golden afternoon sun, Tuyen Lam Lake exudes a serene and magical beauty that captivates every traveler. The lake is an ideal destination for nature lovers and adventure seekers alike. Visitors can take a boat ride across the tranquil waters, enjoying the fresh mountain air and the gentle ripples that spread across the surface. Kayaking and fishing are also popular activities, allowing guests to fully immerse themselves in the lake’s peaceful ambiance. For those who prefer land-based adventures, hiking and cycling along the lakeside trails provide breathtaking panoramic views. Tuyen Lam Lake is also home to several charming resorts and cafes, where visitors can sip a cup of hot coffee while admiring the picturesque scenery. The surrounding pine forests create a perfect atmosphere for relaxation, making it a favorite spot for couples and families looking to escape the hustle and bustle of city life. Whether exploring its scenic landscapes or simply enjoying a quiet moment by the shore, Tuyen Lam Lake is truly a paradise of tranquility and natural beauty in the heart of Da Lat.

reviews.author: Danni Oen
reviews.text: Lovely and quiet. We went for a walk and enjoyed the view with a coconut!

reviews.author: Lawrence Ooley
reviews.text: A very nice lake and a pleasant, but long walk from the city if you're up for a nice hike. Many sights to see on the way there. I didn't go out on the lake, just sat on the shore and enjoyed a coffee and the cool clean air. There are both paddle boats and others you can rent. You can also take a cable car up to Truc Lam Buddhist monastery from the lake, which is a very serene and beautiful site. I went there last year from Robin Hill. Great views from the cable cars.

reviews.author: Hui Lin
reviews.text: very beautiful lake and landscape worth visiting 💯 we visited together with truc lam monastery and got there using cable car 👍🏻 pity it was raining very bad when we went so couldn’t really enjoy 😢 we would have wanted to join the boat tour or even just boat paddling 😢

reviews.author: Amanda Culver
reviews.text: Travelers coming to enjoy nature please take note before coming/booking: swimming isn't allowed because "people have died in it before," kayaks and sup boards are hard to come by, either you book a guided tour in the city center, however if you want to rent solo for 1-2 hours you still pay 300-600k (someone has lost their mind, renting a scooter for a day is cheaper). Additionally, large ugly resorts have gated off and developed a large part of the lakeshore, well other "hidden" areas are littered with trash, but if you can look past that fact and try to get closer to the water, I've been told locals will report you. So yes, this lake is romantic and scenic, however, it isn't what it seems. It did offer me a nice drive, although you can encircle the entire lake. Over all, this experience was so disappointing for a natural-born lake girl.

reviews.author: liping cai
reviews.text: It's beautiful.The best way you travel in DALAT is take a motorbike.If the weather is fine only 6 hours (rent half day VND100.000) is enough.i'm luck yesterday morning is shining day,although is a rain season.temperature is 20℃.

reviews.author: Bach Le
reviews.text: This is the most beautiful lake in Dalat - my opinion. Now many tourists start to come here, also many resorts open so close to the lake, which make this place is not as beautiful as 8 years ago...

reviews.author: Bill Lai
reviews.text: Good veiw and pristine scenery. From here you can visit Truc Lam Zen monastery and take cable car up to Robin hill in Dalat city

reviews.author: vinh lang
reviews.text: This is a good place with o lot of nice and peaceful restaurants and cafes for visitors to relax. Highly recommend.

reviews.author: Hải Vũ
reviews.text: Most beautiful lake in Da Lat, nice place to take pictures. You will be much more enjoy if you go there by motorcycle. Can also rent a boat.

reviews.author: Ak
reviews.text: This is a nice lake with some great cafes around. Very nice place to visit on a nice blue sky day :) If you drive scooter, try driving around this lake on a sunny day because it’s very nice and pretty.

reviews.author: KM
reviews.text: It’s not a crowded place. If you plan to ride a motorbike to the waterfall, take this path so you can have the lake view.

reviews.author: JL Doan
reviews.text: This was a beautiful lake to ride around. Friends have told me that camping is possible in certain parts surrounding the lake. I hope to connect time I’m in Da Lat

reviews.author: Hooman Being
reviews.text: Nice and panoramic view with the lake and pine forest.

reviews.author: McCombie Keira
reviews.text: Peaceful and beautiful lake just outside Da Lat. Surrounded by pine forests and fresh air—perfect for walking, or just relaxing by the water. A great escape from the city!

reviews.author: Globetrekker Sarah
reviews.text: It was beautiful. There are several cafes and restaurants by the lake. You can take a boat ride.

reviews.author: mango sorbet
reviews.text: We tried to watch the sunrise but we couldnt see anything. We couldn’t find where the bottom lake was so we just drove around. It was a good experience tho but maybe the weather wasn’t on our side :(

reviews.author: Nikhil Dange
reviews.text: Scenic view of lake!! Small shop nearby for food & boats for riding.

reviews.author: Matthew
reviews.text: Good view with lake and pine forest

reviews.author: Maria Jose Fonnoll
reviews.text: Suuper beautiful place to see in Da Lat, it is peaceful and beautiful. If you come here, I would also recommend the Zen Monastery near by that is amazing and has awesome gardens

reviews.author: Kate S.
reviews.text: Such a beautiful lake! Must see when you’re in Da Lat!
